meaning: n.[蛹望逡ｪ譛ｨ魑也｢ｱ,莠檎抜鬩ｬ髓ｱ蟄千｢ｱ
examples: Working with Pelletier, he isolated quinine, strychnine, brucine, cinchonine, veratrine, and colchicine, some of which became widely used as drugs.
OBJECTIVE to determine optimized prescription and technique for preparing brucine long-circulating liposomes (BLCL) by means of optimization screening, and to evaluate its quality.
